summary: Targeted, modifiable BIO-PSYCHO-SOCIAL levers to address post-concussion concerns: sustained concentration impairment (C01), screen-sensory nausea (C02), irritability (C03), permanence beliefs about symptoms (C04), causal attributions to concussion (C05), and daily functional impact (C06). Proposals span attention enhancement with cognitive offloading, graded sensory exposure, emotion-regulation training, belief modification, attribution retraining, environmental/work accommodations, sleep optimization, nutrition/hydration, cognitive aids, and social support. Each lever is actionable, non-diagnostic, and designed to improve specific criteria through measurable, time-bound changes, with attention to safety and feasibility.

solutions.solution_candidate: Combine computerized attention training with external cognitive supports (task chunking, checklists, note-taking) to reduce cognitive load and improve sustained attention (C01) and daily functioning (C06).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Improves executive control and reduces working-memory burden; external aids offload cognitive demands, enabling better task engagement and performance.
solutions.measurement: CPT-based performance metrics; daily task completion rate; self-rated concentration on a 0-10 scale.
solutions.mapping_query: Assess impact on C01 and C06 by comparing baseline vs 8-12 week metrics; monitor adherence to attention training schedule and use of external aids.

solutions.solution_candidate: Implement a graded exposure plan to screen use with scheduled breaks, brightness/contrast adjustments, and vestibulo-ocular exercises to reduce screen-provoked nausea and improve screen-based task tolerance.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Gradual sensory exposure reduces salience of visual-provoked nausea; ergonomic optimization lowers sensory load during tasks.
solutions.measurement: Daily screen exposure (minutes); nausea rating (0-10); perceived task ability and objective task completion rate.
solutions.safety_notes: Monitor for worsening nausea or vertigo; escalate if persistent vomiting or presyncope.
solutions.mapping_query: Track changes in C02 and C06; correlate nausea reduction with increased screen tolerance.

solutions.solution_candidate: Provide structured mindfulness, cognitive reappraisal, and distress tolerance skills with daily irritability tracking to reduce irritability (C03) and stabilize daily functioning (C06).
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Enhanced emotion regulation reduces reactivity to daily stressors, lowering irritability and improving engagement in tasks.
solutions.measurement: Irritability scale (0-10) daily; frequency of irritant events; daily functioning rating.
solutions.mapping_query: Monitor reductions in irritability and improvements in C06-related functioning.

solutions.solution_candidate: Deliver concussion recovery psychoeducation plus cognitive restructuring to address permanence beliefs (C04) and perpetual attribution (C05), encouraging active engagement in rehabilitation.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Corrects catastrophic beliefs, improves rehabilitation adherence and hope, reducing distress and functional impairment.
solutions.measurement: Permanent symptom belief scale (0-10); engagement metrics; self-efficacy rating.
solutions.mapping_query: Evaluate shift in beliefs about permanence and concussion-related attributions; track rehab engagement.

solutions.solution_candidate: Use attribution retraining and self-efficacy building to reduce fixed attribution to concussion and strengthen belief in recovery capacity; include social support cues.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Shifts from fixed pathology belief to adaptive recovery expectancy, improving motivation and engagement across functioning.
solutions.measurement: C04/C05 belief indicators; self-efficacy scale; rehab engagement.
solutions.mapping_query: Assess changes in beliefs and self-efficacy; track rehab participation and C06 improvements.

solutions.solution_candidate: Collaborate with employer/educator to implement task chunking, scheduling breaks, reduced multitasking, and accessible interfaces to minimize C06-related impairment and support C01.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Environmental scaffolding reduces cognitive load, enabling better concentration and daily functioning.
solutions.measurement: Daily functioning score; number of tasks completed; subjective cognitive load during work.
solutions.mapping_query: Monitor C01 and C06 improvements with implemented accommodations.

solutions.solution_candidate: Establish consistent sleep schedule, optimize sleep environment and light exposure to support brain recovery and daytime concentration and irritability.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Sleep regularity enhances cognitive restoration and emotional regulation, reducing concentration lapses and irritability.
solutions.measurement: Sleep diary (durations/quality); next-day alertness; fluctuations in irritability.
solutions.mapping_query: Assess sleep quality improvements and downstream effects on C01 and C06/C03.

solutions.solution_candidate: Introduce external cognitive aids (digital notes, calendars, task lists) and training to reduce working memory load and dependence on screens; improves concentration and reduces cognitive fatigue.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Externalizing memory reduces cognitive strain and helps sustain attention; fosters independence.
solutions.measurement: Usage metrics; daily concentration rating; task completion rate.
solutions.mapping_query: Monitor correlation between aid usage and improvements in C01/C06.

solutions.solution_candidate: Optimize hydration and nutrition (balanced meals, omega-3, antioxidants) to support neural energy and reduce brain fog; monitor symptoms and caffeine intake.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Adequate hydration and nutrition support neurotransmitter function and energy availability, aiding concentration.
solutions.measurement: Dietary logs; water intake; self-rated cognitive energy; concentration diaries.
solutions.mapping_query: Assess association between dietary changes and C01/C06 improvements.

solutions.solution_candidate: Engage family and friends, or coach to provide emotional support and practical help; connect with social-prescribing resources; monitor impact on daily functioning and mood.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Social support buffers stress, improves adherence to rehab activities, and reduces perceived impairment.
solutions.measurement: Social support scale; frequency of supportive interactions; daily functioning.
solutions.mapping_query: Evaluate how increased social support relates to C06 improvements and overall mood.
